violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Several wet wiping cloths left out on the prep tables and kitchen area.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Thawing bucket of squid under the 3 compartment sink, need to be thawed under refrigeration or cold running water.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single-use sauce cups being stored on the floor in the dry storage area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
